message:
fix: resolve 8 integration test root causes across all providers

Anthropic streaming tool calls: content_block_start sends input:{}
as a placeholder; capturing it corrupted actual arguments from
input_json_delta events (e.g. {}{"city":"Paris"}). Removed placeholder
capture, default empty args to {}, ensure toAnthropicMessages never
sends null input.

Anthropic max_tokens vs budget_tokens: when extended thinking is
enabled, Anthropic requires max_tokens > budget_tokens. Adjust
max_tokens in adapter when thinking budget exceeds it.

Gemini finish reason: Gemini returns "STOP" even with tool calls
(no distinct tool-call finish reason). Override to "tool_calls"
when tool calls present, in both Complete and Stream paths.

Anthropic structured output: strip markdown code fences that models
sometimes wrap around JSON output despite instructions.

Test fixes: replace flaky 1x1 PNG with proper 10x10 generated image,
use httpbin URL instead of Wikipedia (403s from API servers), relax
parallel tool call assertion, redesign multi-step tool loop with
unpredictable codes, add additionalProperties:false for OpenAI schema.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
